case_title: LEAVY, AILEEN VS BLANDING, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGER'S
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-16-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28128, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEAVY, AILEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGER'S JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28128 ON 05/18/06. RESPONDENT FAILED TO PROVE ANY MONEY DAMAGES INCURRED AS A RESULT OF BREACH OF LEASE. ALL REPAIRS EXIST WHEN COMPLAINT FILED HAVE BEEN DONE. EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEAVY, AILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGER'S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
